description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/m3m3nto/zorbalinux:latest. Define a single job named test that runs in the default test stage and executes the exact shell command /builds/m3m3ent0/zorbalinux/build-ci.sh. No additional services, variables, caches, artifacts, or rules are specified, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
